TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 318 BEFORE JUDGE MILLER. THE PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AND CONTACT THE CLERK AT (415) 551-3738 AND DEPT318@SFTC.ORG TO SET THE HEARING DATE. PLEASE DO NOT LEAVE A VOICEMAIL. IF A CLERK DOES NOT ANSWER, PLEASE LEAVE YOUR MESSAGE AND CONTACT INFORMATION AT DEPT318@SFTC.ORG WITH A COPY TO ALL OTHER PARTIES. THE COURT WILL NOT PROVIDE A COURT REPORTER FOR THIS HEARING. IF ANY PARTY WISHES A REPORTER, THE PARTIES MUST MEET AND CONFER AND AGREE ON A SINGLE REPORTER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
